body.title: CC daily chat logs — Stop-hook formatter from JSONL transcripts
body.result: chat_log_formatter.py + Stop hook in ~/.claude/settings.json + .gitignore. Converts JSONL transcripts to daily markdown at ~/TheIgors/claude_chat_logs/YYYY-MM-DD.md with per-session state cursor. Commit e82be852.
body.description:
Now that Claude Code runs inside tmux, scrollback is ephemeral. Build a Stop-hook formatter that converts CC's durable JSONL transcripts into append-only daily markdown logs. Output: ~/TheIgors/claude_chat_logs/YYYY-MM-DD.md (gitignored).

## Why
- tmux scrollback is lost on detach/reattach
- CC already saves every turn as JSONL at ~/.claude/projects/-home-akien-TheIgors/*.jsonl
- Akien wants grep-able, date-indexed chat history
- Bonus: this becomes durable training data for Igor (how Akien + CC collaborate, what decisions get made)

## Design
- Standalone script: lab/claudecode/chat_log_formatter.py
- Reads the current session's JSONL (detect via newest mtime in ~/.claude/projects/-home-akien-TheIgors/)
- Emits markdown: user messages as '## Akien [HH:MM]', assistant text as '## CC', tool calls summarized in one line (not full arg dumps — too noisy)
- Appends only entries newer than last-flush marker (avoid duplicating on every Stop)
- Stop hook in ~/.claude/settings.json runs the formatter after every turn

## Acceptance
- After a few exchanges, ~/TheIgors/claude_chat_logs/2026-04-18.md exists and contains today's conversation in readable form
- Next day's file auto-rolls at midnight (based on message timestamps, not file mtime)
- Tool call summaries are one line (not the full JSON blob)
- .gitignore updated to exclude claude_chat_logs/

## Non-goals
- Don't duplicate JSONL — formatter is derived view, JSONL remains source of truth
- Don't include CC's internal thinking blocks (too noisy; not useful as history)
- No retention policy yet (add later if it grows unbounded)
